summary: Tested multi-printer support features: 1) GET /api/download-print-agent returns 200 and serves Python file correctly. 2) GET /api/printers returns 200 with printers list. 3) Settings page shows print agent status bar (orange when disconnected) with 'تحميل الوسيط' (Download Agent) and 'فحص' (Check) buttons. 4) POS page loads correctly without JS errors. 5) printService.js exports all required functions. 6) Packaging materials regression test passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/download-print-agent returns 200 with maestro_print_agent.py file
VERIFIED: GET /api/printers returns 200 with printers list
VERIFIED: Settings page Printers tab shows print agent status bar (orange dot when disconnected)
VERIFIED: 'تحميل الوسيط' (Download Agent) button visible in Settings > Printers
VERIFIED: 'فحص' (Check) button visible in Settings > Printers
VERIFIED: POS page loads correctly with categories, products, and cart
VERIFIED: printService.js exports checkAgentStatus, sendTestPrint, printOrderToAllPrinters
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-printer support features verified: 1) Backend endpoint /api/download-print-agent serves the Python print agent file. 2) Settings > Printers tab shows agent status bar with orange indicator when agent is offline (expected since agent runs locally on POS machine). 3) Download Agent and Check buttons are visible. 4) POS page loads correctly with printService imports. 5) printService.js exports all required functions for multi-printer routing.

notes: The print agent status shows 'disconnected' (orange) as expected since the agent is designed to run locally on the user's POS machine, not on the preview server. This is correct behavior.
